title: Neoprene Double Zipper Cosmetic Bag with Front Pocket Travel Makeup Organizer
seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Double Zipper Cosmetic Bag | Travel Makeup Organizer Manufacturer
description:
Designed for users who need quick organization on the go, this Neoprene Double Zipper Cosmetic Bag combines modern aesthetics with practical storage. Unlike ordinary cosmetic pouches, the additional front zipper compartment allows you to separate frequently used items such as lipstick, compact mirrors, makeup brushes or travel accessories, keeping everything neatly organized.

Made from premium neoprene material, the bag offers a soft yet durable structure that cushions delicate cosmetics against bumps during travel. The water-resistant surface helps protect your beauty essentials from moisture, while the smooth zipper system ensures effortless opening and closing.

The spacious main compartment accommodates skincare bottles, foundation, sunscreen, makeup palettes and toiletries without becoming bulky. Whether placed inside a suitcase, backpack or carry-on luggage, its lightweight construction makes packing simple and convenient.

As a professional cosmetic bag manufacturer, Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides flexible OEM and ODM customization services, including logo printing, custom zipper colors, fabric options, packaging design and size customization for promotional projects and retail brands worldwide.
seoDescription: Organize cosmetics with this custom neoprene double zipper cosmetic bag featuring a front storage pocket, water-resistant material and OEM logo customization. Factory wholesale for global brands.
